system.description: The x-ray vision spell enables a willing subject to see through inanimate barriers. For each success on the spellcaster's Spell Success Test, the subject can see through 1 Barrier Rating Point of non-living objects. The subject must spend a Simple Action to do so. The line of sight provided by the x-ray vision spell fulfills the LOS requirement for casting other spells. The x-ray vision spell does not enable subjects to see through living or magical barriers, and does not work in astral space.
